---
name: Educational content issue
about: Report a problem with generated or fallback educational content
title: "[Content]: "
labels: content, education
assignees: ""
---

## Content Problem

What is wrong with the question, hint, explanation, recommendation, or report?

## Content Source

- [ ] AI-generated mission
- [ ] Fallback/sample question
- [ ] Daily challenge
- [ ] SRS review
- [ ] Guardian recommendation
- [ ] Mission report

## Why It Matters

Explain the learning risk, such as incorrect answer, unclear wording, unsuitable difficulty, weak distractors, or unsafe advice.

## Suggested Improvement

If possible, provide a corrected generic example.

## Privacy Check

- [ ] I did not include real student names, classroom records, private learning reports, or API keys.
- [ ] Any example text is synthetic or public/generic.
